\documentclass[a4paper,11pt]{article}
\usepackage{import}
\usepackage{fancyvrb}
\newcommand{\example}[2]{%
  \par\noindent\textbf{Input}\par
  \VerbatimInput{#1}%
  \par\noindent\textbf{Output}\par
  \VerbatimInput{#2}%
  \par
}
\begin{document}

\section*{\VAR{problem.title | escape}}

\VAR{problem.blocks.legend}

\textbf{Input.} \VAR{problem.blocks.input}

\textbf{Output.} \VAR{problem.blocks.output}

%- if problem.samples
  \subsection*{Examples}
  %- for sample in problem.samples
    \example{\VAR{sample.input}}{\VAR{sample.output if sample.output is not none else ''}}
  %- endfor
%- endif

\end{document}
